name: content-type-parameters
description: Message with multiple Content-Type parameters (RFC 2045 section 5.1)
input:
From: sender@example.com
To: recipient@example.com
Subject: Content-Type Params
Date: Mon, 27 Jan 2026 10:00:00 +0000
Message-ID: <ct-123@example.com>
MIME-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=iso-8859-1; format=flowed; delsp=yes

Text with parameters.
